description: PandaScore provides esports data products, including statistics, schedules, and live match feeds for games such as League of Legends, Counter-Strike, Dota 2, and Valorant. Its service is aimed at powering esports stats, odds, and related applications.
summary: PandaScore exposes a token-authenticated REST API at `https://api.pandascore.co/` plus a token-authenticated live WebSockets feed at `wss://live.pandascore.co/matches/{match_id}`; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI was found.

surfaces.name: PandaScore REST API for All Videogames
